faqs.question: What pests are most common in Far Rockaway?
faqs.answer: Far Rockaway residents commonly encounter German cockroaches, ants, mice, rats, bed bugs, and silverfish. The coastal location also brings occasional issues with mosquitoes and flies, especially during warmer months. Our general pest control service addresses all of these pests with targeted treatments.
